actions-list.actionItem: Pursuant to the order of Thursday, March 5, 2026,  the Journal of the proceedings of the Senate was deemed approved to date.
Pursuant to the order of Thursday, March 5, 2026, the morning hour being deemed expired, and the times for the recognition of the two leaders being reserved.
The following transactions of morning business occurred on today.

PN711:
        Lt. Gen. Joshua M. Rudd, in the Army, to be General

        -- Considered by Senate.

        -- By unanimous consent agreement, mandatory quorum required under Rule XXII waived.

        -- By unanimous consent agreement, vote 3/10/2026.

        -- Cloture invoked in Senate by Yea-Nay Vote. 68 - 28. Record Vote Number: 48
Under the authority of the order of today, at  6:21 p.m, the Presiding Officer (Mr. Ricketts in the chair) declared the Senate adjourned, under its order of today, until 10 a.m. tomorrow.
